title: SQL injection via f-string interpolation
author: contributor
diff:
--- a/db.py
+++ b/db.py
@@ -20,4 +20,6 @@ import sqlite3
 
 def find_user(username):
+    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '{username}'"
+    cursor.execute(query)
+    return cursor.fetchone()

gold_issues.description: SQL injection: user input interpolated directly into SQL via f-string. Use parameterized queries.
